narrative:
Greeneview Local Sd school district has 5,567 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -20.1% D−R vs -41.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
